titleStmt.title: SII 6.694: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 694. (A.R. No. 243 of 1899). ON THE BASE OF THE ASTHANA-MANDAPA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣagetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa yavanarājyasthāpanācārya śrīvīrapratāpa kṛṣṇadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagarasiṁhāsanārūḍuṁḍai pūrvadigvijayayātraku viccē
śi Uddagiri koṁḍavīḍu koṁḍapalli rājamahēṁdrāvaraṁ modalayina durgālu sādhiṁci siṁhyadriki viccēśi svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁbulu 1438 Agunēṁṭī dhātusaṁvatsara caitra ba 12 varāna siṁhyādrināthunni darśiṁci tama talli nāgādēvaṁmaṁgārikiṁni tama taṁḍri narasānāyaniṁgāri
ki puṁṇyaṁgānu dēvuniki samarpiṁcina kaṁṭhamāla 1 ki mutyālu 91 vajramāṇikyāla kaḍiyālajōḍu 1 śaṁkhacakrālu padakaṁ 1 paiṁḍipaḷḷeṁ 1 ki tūṁkālu ga 44782 kānikamāḍalu ga 2000 tama dēvuḷu ciṁnādēvaṁmaṁgāri cātanu samarpiṁcina padakaṁ 1 varahālu ga 500 tirumaladēvaṁmaṁgāri cātanu sama
rpiṁcina padakaṁ 1 varahālu ga 500 Iṁtavaṭṭu samarpiṁcina dharmaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 6.694 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
